title: Massage Therapists
description: Perform therapeutic massages of soft tissues and joints. May assist in the assessment of range of motion and muscle strength, or propose client therapy plans.

tasks.text: Confer with clients about their medical histories and problems with stress or pain to determine how massage will be most helpful.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Massage and knead muscles and soft tissues of the body to provide treatment for medical conditions, injuries, or wellness maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain massage areas by restocking supplies or sanitizing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply finger and hand pressure to specific points of the body.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and propose client treatment plans that specify which types of massage are to be used.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess clients' soft tissue condition, joint quality and function, muscle strength, and range of motion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide clients with guidance and information about techniques for postural improvement and stretching, strengthening, relaxation, and rehabilitative exercises.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Treat clients in professional settings or travel to clients' offices and homes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer clients to other types of therapists when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and blend oils and apply the blends to clients' skin.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with other health care professionals, such as physiotherapists, chiropractors, physicians, and psychologists, to develop treatment plans for clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform other adjunctive therapies or treatment techniques in addition to massage.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use complementary aids, such as infrared lamps, wet compresses, ice, and whirlpool baths to promote clients' recovery, relaxation, and well-being.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
